title: hieracium benzianum subsp. subruncinatulum
intro: Hieracium benzianum subsp. subruncinatulum is a rare and lesser-known species of hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium benzianum subsp. subruncinatulum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible antiviral and antibacterial properties. This plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
